UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores supplementary user information not handled by external authentication systems.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to the user's ID from the external authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth UID).

email.description: The user's email address, if provided and public.

acceptingInvites.description: Whether the user is currently accepting game invitations from other players.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the user's last online heartbeat.

Game.title: Game
Game.description: Represents a single Go game, including its state, players, and settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Game entity.

playerWhiteId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the player playing as white.

playerBlackId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the player playing as black.

playerWhiteName.description: Display name of the white player.

playerBlackName.description: Display name of the black player.

playerBlackTimeUsed.description: Total time used by the black player in seconds.

playerWhiteTimeUsed.description: Total time used by the white player in seconds.

currentTurn.description: Indicates whose turn it currently is. Expected values: 'white' or 'black'.

boardSize.description: The size of the Go board (e.g., 9, 13, 19).

handicap.description: The number of handicap stones given at the start of the game.

komi.description: The komi value given to the second player (white).

status.description: The current status of the game. Expected values: 'pending', 'in-progress', 'finished', 'resigned', 'timed-out'.

winnerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the winner, if the game has concluded.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the game officially started.

moveCount.description: Total moves made in this game, including passes.

Move.title: Move
Move.description: Records a single move made during a Go game, including position, player, and AI evaluation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Move entity.

gameId.description: Reference to the Game entity this move belongs to.

playerColor.description: The color of the player who made this move. Expected values: 'white' or 'black'.

coordinatesX.description: The X-coordinate (column) of the stone placed on the board (0-indexed).

coordinatesY.description: The Y-coordinate (row) of the stone placed on the board (0-indexed).

moveNumber.description: The sequential number of this move within the game.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this move was made.

definition.description: Records individual moves within a specific game.

firestore.reasoning: Standard hierarchical structure for users, games, and moves.
